equipmentSystem.title: Hunter's Arsenal
equipmentSystem.description: Hunters carry specialized equipment for the hunt. A hunter may carry up to 5 items at a time. At character creation, choose 1 low-tier weapon and 4 additional low-tier items. After a hunt with high pay, each hunter may acquire 1 high-tier item. After a hunt with low pay, hunters may resupply up to 5 low-tier items.

rules.startingEquipment: 1 low-tier weapon + 4 low-tier items of your choice
rules.highPayReward: Each hunter may acquire 1 high-tier item (including Trick Weapons)

tiers.name: Low Pay
tiers.description: Standard hunter equipment. Available at character creation and during resupply after any hunt.

tiers.name: High Pay
tiers.description: Rare and powerful equipment, including Trick Weapons. Acquired only after hunts with high pay.

subcategories.name: Weapon
subcategories.description: Arms designed to kill monsters. All weapons deal 1 damage on a successful attack (2 on a critical). High-tier weapons are called Trick Weapons — each has a hidden mechanism or enchantment.

subcategories.name: Protection
subcategories.description: Armor, shields, wards, and relics that guard the hunter. Protection items specify which damage types they resist. Required to @Brace.

subcategories.name: Control
subcategories.description: Implements that bind, stall, move, or manipulate monsters — forcing them into unfavorable positions.

subcategories.name: Denial
subcategories.description: Items that strip monsters of their advantages — preventing abilities, forcing @Wind Up, or shutting down attacks.

equipment.name: Hunter's Sabre
equipment.description: A curved blade favoured by hunters who like their prey within arm’s reach. Deals 1 Physical damage at Close range.

equipment.name: Boarding Axe
equipment.description: Salvaged from a derelict galleon, its edge has tasted things worse than wood. Deals 1 Physical damage at Close range.

equipment.name: Spear
equipment.description: Long-hafted and reliable — the weapon of choice for those who prefer distance between themselves and death. Deals 1 Physical damage at Near range.

equipment.name: Crossbow
equipment.description: Cranked, loaded, and loosed — a mechanical answer to things that refuse to die quietly. Deals 1 Physical damage at Far range.

equipment.name: Flintlock Pistol
equipment.description: One shot. Make it count. Deals 1 Physical damage at Near range.

equipment.name: Hunting Knife
equipment.description: Every hunter carries a blade. This one has carved more than game. Deals 1 Physical damage at Close range.

equipment.name: Mace
equipment.description: Blunt, heavy, and indifferent to armor. If it bleeds, it can be bludgeoned. Deals 1 Physical damage at Close range.

equipment.name: Hunter's Musket
equipment.description: Long-barreled and thunderous. One shot that echoes across the valley. Deals 1 Physical damage at Far range.

equipment.name: Halberd
equipment.description: Half axe, half spear, entirely unforgiving. Reach keeps the beasts at bay. Deals 1 Physical damage at Near range.

equipment.name: Whip-Cleaver
equipment.trick: On a successful hit, you may immediately make one additional attack against the same target.
equipment.description: A segmented blade that cracks outward like a lash before snapping rigid for the kill. On a successful hit, make one additional attack against the same target.

equipment.name: Sanctified Glaive
equipment.description: Blessed by hands that no longer tremble. Its edge burns things that have no blood to spill. Deals @Hybrid Damage at Near range.

equipment.name: Twinblade Repeater
equipment.trick: After this weapon hits, the next hunter to attack the same target has Advantage.
equipment.description: A heavy repeating crossbow that pins monsters in place with barbed bolts. After a hit, the next hunter to attack the same target has @Advantage.

equipment.name: Moonsilver Rapier
equipment.trick: This weapon deals Spiritual damage. On a successful hit, you may attempt to Dodge (test Agility) as a free action.
equipment.description: Forged under a dead moon from ore that hums with grief. Its wielder moves like a phantom. Deals @Spiritual Damage; on a hit, you may attempt to @Dodge as a free action.

equipment.name: Cruel Claw
equipment.trick: On a critical hit (natural 1), deal 3 damage instead of 2.
equipment.description: A gauntlet fitted with curved blades that slot between the knuckles. It kills the way wolves do. On a critical hit, deal 3 damage instead of 2.

equipment.name: Pyre Lance
equipment.trick: This weapon deals Hybrid damage. On a hit, the target’s next successful attack deals 1 less damage (minimum 0).
equipment.description: A lance wreathed in consecrated flame that cauterizes the wound as it strikes. Deals @Hybrid Damage at Near range; on a hit, the target’s next attack deals 1 less damage (minimum 0).

equipment.name: Leather Cuirass
equipment.description: Boiled and hardened until it could stop a claw. Won’t help against what lurks in the dark. Allows @Brace against @Physical Damage.

equipment.name: Iron Buckler
equipment.description: Small enough to strap to the forearm, sturdy enough to crack teeth. Allows @Brace against @Physical Damage.

equipment.name: Talisman of Warding
equipment.description: A crude pendant etched with symbols older than language. It grows warm when evil draws near. Allows @Brace against @Spiritual Damage.

equipment.name: Hunter's Greatcoat
equipment.description: Layered leather and oilcloth stitched with horsehair. It won’t stop a blade, but it’ll slow one down. Allows @Brace against @Physical Damage.

equipment.name: Ashen Plate
equipment.description: Forged in the kiln-fires of a burned cathedral. The ash is fused into the metal itself. Allows @Brace against @Physical Damage, @Spiritual Damage, and @Hybrid Damage.

equipment.name: Veilglass Aegis
equipment.trick: When you successfully Brace with this shield, the attacker’s next attack has Disadvantage.
equipment.description: A translucent shield that refracts light in impossible directions. Allows @Brace against all damage types. When you successfully @Brace, the attacker’s next attack has @Disadvantage.

equipment.name: Bear Trap
equipment.description: Iron jaws hidden beneath leaves. Place before or during combat. A monster that moves through it is immobilized until it passes a @Body test.

equipment.name: Bolas
equipment.description: Weighted cords that tangle limbs and wings. Test @Agility to throw at Near range. On a hit, the target cannot @Flee or move until it passes a @Body test.

equipment.name: Grappling Chain
equipment.description: Thirty links of forged iron ending in a barbed hook. Test @Body to hurl at Near range. On a hit, pull the target to @Close range.

equipment.name: Snare Wire
equipment.description: Thin steel wire strung low across a path. Set before or during combat. A creature that triggers it must test @Agility or fall prone, losing its next action.

equipment.name: Cavalry Net
equipment.description: Woven from wire and weighted at the edges. Test @Body to throw at Near range. A target struck cannot attack until it passes a @Body test to tear free.

equipment.name: Caltrops
equipment.description: Scattered iron spikes that punish anything reckless enough to charge through. When deployed, caltrops cover a 10 square foot area. A monster that moves through the area must test @Agility or take 1 damage and lose its movement.

equipment.name: Binding Censer
equipment.trick: Bound monsters have Disadvantage on tests to break free.
equipment.description: Incense billows from its iron mouth and coils around the unclean like living rope. A monster at Near range must test @Focus or be bound in smoke, unable to move. Bound monsters have @Disadvantage on tests to break free.

equipment.name: Witchstone Anchor
equipment.description: A heavy rune-carved stone that screams when activated. Place it on the ground. Until the end of combat, no creature within @Close range of the anchor may use @Flee or any movement abilities.

equipment.name: Black Incense
equipment.description: The smoke smells of burnt hair and forgotten graves. Monsters that breathe it must test @Focus or lose their @Special Abilities until the end of the round.

equipment.name: Flash Charge
equipment.description: A sparking implement that erupts in blinding white light in a cone. Monsters in the cone must test @Agility or be blinded, treating all attacks as @Wind Up until the end of the round.

equipment.name: Silver Dust
equipment.description: Ground from blessed coins and scattered like seed. Monsters at @Close range that contact the dust must test @Fate or be unable to use supernatural abilities until the end of the round.

equipment.name: Iron Bell
equipment.description: Its tone cuts through enchantment like a knife through fog. Ring the bell — all monsters at @Near range must test @Focus or have their current buffs suppressed until the end of the round.

equipment.name: Torch
equipment.description: Fire is the oldest ward. Thrust the torch at a monster at @Close range — test @Body. On success, the monster cannot @Flee until the end of the round. Many creatures fear flame.

equipment.name: Bomb
equipment.description: Black powder and nails packed into a clay shell. Test @Body or @Agility to throw at Near range. All creatures within @Close range must test @Agility or take 1 damage.

equipment.name: Nullstone Bomb
equipment.trick: Affects all creatures in the area. No test to resist.
equipment.description: A sphere of compressed void-matter that shatters reality in a small radius. Throw at Near range. All creatures within @Close range lose all buffs, immunities, and @Special Abilities until the end of the next round. No test to resist.

equipment.name: Soulsnare Lantern
equipment.description: Its light is wrong — too white, too cold. Open the shutter to illuminate a single monster. That monster must test @Fate or be forced to @Wind Up on its next turn, regardless of its attack roll.
